title: Admin export omits rows created in the last hour
body: Reproduced on staging with seed data. Happens roughly one in five attempts; logs attached in the thread. Happens only when the feature flag is on for less than one percent of traffic, so canary metrics hide it.

title: Broken deep link from email digest into billing
body: Happens only when the feature flag is on for less than one percent of traffic, so canary metrics hide it. Downstream team confirmed they see duplicate deliveries. We should dedupe by idempotency key.

title: Stale cache served for auth after config reload
body: Reproduced on staging with seed data. Happens roughly one in five attempts; logs attached in the thread. First reported by support. Customer impact is low but steady; workaround is a manual refresh.

title: Sorting by updated_at unstable in auth list view
body: Suspected race between the cache warmer and the config reloader. A mutex around reload may be enough. Bisected to the May infrastructure upgrade. Reverting locally makes the symptom disappear.

title: Sorting by updated_at unstable in search list view
body: First reported by support. Customer impact is low but steady; workaround is a manual refresh. Downstream team confirmed they see duplicate deliveries. We should dedupe by idempotency key. Flagged during the quarterly security review; not exploitable on its own but worth hardening.

title: Memory growth in long-running exports consumer
body: Bisected to the May infrastructure upgrade. Reverting locally makes the symptom disappear. Needs triage. Error rate is below the alert threshold so it never pages, which is why it lingered.

title: Memory growth in long-running admin consumer
body: Happens only when the feature flag is on for less than one percent of traffic, so canary metrics hide it. Needs triage. Error rate is below the alert threshold so it never pages, which is why it lingered.

title: Broken deep link from email digest into profile
body: Reproduced on staging with seed data. Happens roughly one in five attempts; logs attached in the thread. Downstream team confirmed they see duplicate deliveries. We should dedupe by idempotency key.

title: Rate limiter counts notifications retries twice
body: Happens only when the feature flag is on for less than one percent of traffic, so canary metrics hide it. Bisected to the May infrastructure upgrade. Reverting locally makes the symptom disappear.

title: Security: JWT signature not verified on token refresh path
body: Refresh tokens are accepted without verifying the signature. This is a critical security flaw: session takeover is possible with a forged refresh token. Treat as critical until patched.

title: Sorting by updated_at unstable in cart list view
body: Bisected to the May infrastructure upgrade. Reverting locally makes the symptom disappear. Happens only when the feature flag is on for less than one percent of traffic, so canary metrics hide it.

body: Suspected race between the cache warmer and the config reloader. A mutex around reload may be enough. First reported by support. Customer impact is low but steady; workaround is a manual refresh.

body: Needs triage. Error rate is below the alert threshold so it never pages, which is why it lingered. Bisected to the May infrastructure upgrade. Reverting locally makes the symptom disappear.

title: Admin pagination drops the last page of results
body: The handler swallows the original exception, so the stack trace in the dashboard is misleading. Downstream team confirmed they see duplicate deliveries. We should dedupe by idempotency key. Marked as a regression by QA during the release candidate sweep.

title: Cart total regression after currency rounding change
body: Regression introduced by the rounding change in v2.9: totals drift by one cent on mixed-currency carts. Release-blocking regression per the launch checklist.
